summary: Comprehensive testing of Castrez Autrans auto workshop website completed. All core features working: appointment form with email notification (Resend) and WhatsApp redirect, admin panel with Excel export, employee attendance page, responsive design. Backend 100% pass rate (26/26 tests), frontend fully functional.

integration_issues.issue: Shows 'No se pudo obtener la ubicación' - expected in automated testing environment without geolocation permissions
integration_issues.note: Not a bug - expected behavior when geolocation is not available

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, Weekly Deals, Services, Parts, Appointment, Location, Footer)
Weekly Deals responsive grid - 2 cols mobile, 3 cols tablet, 4 cols desktop (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4)
Services section with price disclaimer visible
Parts section with proper spacing between search bar and category buttons
Appointment form validation - requires all mandatory fields
Appointment form submission creates record via POST /api/appointments
Email notification sent via Resend API on appointment creation (verified in backend logs)
WhatsApp redirect opens new tab with pre-filled message to +34613430084
Admin dashboard navigation (Productos, Citas, Promociones, Empleados, Lugares, Asistencia, Reportes)
Excel export endpoint GET /api/admin/reports/attendance/excel returns valid .xlsx file
Employee login at /asistencia with juan.garcia / Juan2024
WhatsApp floating button visible on all pages
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp number is hardcoded in AppointmentSection.jsx (WHATSAPP_NUMBER constant) - consider moving to environment variable for easier management
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test appointments created during testing: TEST_Appointment User, TEST_Minimal User, TEST_WhatsApp User
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the requirements are working: 1) Appointment form sends email via Resend to industriasbotton@gmail.com and opens WhatsApp to +34613430084. 2) Responsive design is working across mobile/tablet/desktop. 3) Excel export downloads valid .xlsx file. 4) Admin panel and employee attendance pages functional. No JavaScript errors observed. Backend logs confirm email sending works.

verified_features.appointment_email: Email sent via Resend API (from onboarding@resend.dev to industriasbotton@gmail.com)
verified_features.whatsapp_redirect: Opens api.whatsapp.com/send with phone=34613430084 and pre-filled message
verified_features.excel_export: Downloads asistencia_{date_from}_a_{date_to}.xlsx with valid XLSX content
